query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "qwen-agentworld: language world models for general agents" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as it is a foundational survey and framework for "text world models" (TWMs), which is the canonical alternative-vocabulary cluster and methodological basis for the user's query regarding "Language World Models" in agent systems. It directly addresses the core mechanism (world modeling for agents) and provides the necessary empirical and theoretical baseline for a literature review on extending this specific line of research.
